examples: One kind of heteroscedasticity testing method was proposed through extreme value theory and extreme value index estimator.
The generalized autoregressive conditional heteroscedasticity (GARCH) model has the ability to describe the volatility of time series.
They treat horrifying statistical conditions such as unobserved heterogeneity, selection bias, heteroscedasticity, and autocorrelation.
For example, if you have identified a heteroscedasticity problem in your data, there are various buttons to press that can cure it for you.
